title: Intensely Crunchy Ethiopian Beef Kitfo
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish featuring brown rice noodles and caramelized onions, made sugar-free-friendly and perfect for a lazy Sunday
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat
Add chopped beef and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks
Add sliced onions to the skillet and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally
Add minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
Stir in berbere spice, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute
Cook brown rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside
Add cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the beef and onion mixture
Increase heat to high and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture is crispy and golden brown
